identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Tactical Industrial' design system that feels like a precision tool, not a generic SaaS.
principles: Fusion: Industrial Utility x Swiss Precision
Content: Data is the hero. Legibility is paramount.
Contrast: High contrast for field visibility (sunlight safe).

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, KPI values

mono.usage: License plates, VINs, Part Numbers, Dates

secondary.name: Safety Orange
secondary.usage: Call to Actions (CTAs), Alerts, Critical Status

rules: Never use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid, reliable colors.
Text contrast must be WCAG AA compliant (4.5:1 minimum).
Use 'Safety Orange' sparingly - only for the most important action on the screen.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4.
grid_system.forms: Max-width-2xl mx-auto. Split view on large screens (Form Left, Context Right).
grid_system.lists: Table layout with sticky headers. Dense rows.

containers.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-bold shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-bold shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.default: h-11 bg-white border-slate-300 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500 rounded-md text-base
inputs.label: block text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 mb-1.5

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide border

cards.machine_card: flex flex-col h-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-colors group

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise texture on the sidebar background (opacity 0.02).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are preferred over shadows for separation.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Regular weight). Use 'Duotone' for empty states.

images.strategy: Use authentic, gritty photography. Avoid polished 'stock' looks.

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-button').
Focus states must be clearly visible (ring-2 ring-orange-500).
Do not rely on color alone for status (use icons + text).

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a tool for professionals. It should feel solid, fast, and reliable. Avoid 'cute' UI. Think 'Caterpillar' or 'John Deere' software.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_strategy: Use the 'Bento Grid Mode B' for the dashboard. It must be dense and data-rich. Don't waste space.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_overrides: Customize Shadcn components to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Make borders slightly thicker (border-slate-200) and shadows sharper.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts. Style them with the 'Industrial Slate' and 'Safety Orange' palette. No gradients in charts.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Forms are the core of this app. Make them beautiful. Use 'Split View' for complex forms (Input on left, Helper/Preview on right).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) ONLY for overlays/modals.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
